Emmanuel Gyasi has scored in his last two league games; only one foreign Empoli player has found the net in three consecutive matches in the three points for a win era in Serie A: M`Baye Niang last February. Empoli (W1 D2) have remained unbeaten in their first three Serie A games of the season for only the second time in their history, after 2006/07 (with Luigi Cagni as coach) - the Tuscans then went on to win their fourth game of that season.
